questions.question: Bakery mein cross-contamination rokne ke liye sabse important step kya hai?

options.A: Raw aur cooked food items ko alag rakhna
options.B: Har din floor mop karna
options.D: Sabhi ingredients ko ek saath store karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye, raw aur cooked food items ko hamesha alag rakhna chahiye taaki harmful bacteria transfer na ho.

questions.question: Food handler ko kab gloves pehenna zaruri hai?

options.A: Sirf jab cutting kar rahe ho
options.B: Har baar jab ready-to-eat food handle karein

questions.explanation: Ready-to-eat food handle karte samay gloves pehenna hygiene maintain karne ke liye zaruri hai, taaki direct skin contact se contamination na ho.

questions.question: Kitchen mein fire extinguisher kis type ka hona chahiye?

options.B: Foam-based

questions.explanation: Kitchen fires, especially oil aur fat se hone wale fires ke liye, Class K (Wet Chemical) fire extinguishers sabse effective hote hain.

questions.question: Ek bakery mein food spoilage ka main reason kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Too much sugar in recipe

questions.explanation: Food spoilage ka sabse common reason incorrect storage temperature hai, jo bacteria aur mold growth ko promote karta hai.

questions.question: Sahi handwashing technique mein kitne seconds tak scrubbing karni chahiye?

options.B: 10-15 seconds

questions.explanation: Proper handwashing ke liye kum se kum 20-30 seconds tak soap ke saath scrub karna chahiye taaki germs effectively remove ho sakein.

questions.question: Flour ko store karne ka best tarika kya hai?

options.B: Cool, dry aur airtight container mein
options.D: Open bag mein kitchen counter par

questions.explanation: Flour ko moisture aur pests se bachane ke liye, use cool, dry aur airtight container mein store karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek pastry kitchen mein mixer ke attachments ko clean karne ka sabse accha method kya hai?

options.B: Warm soapy water se wash karke air dry karna
options.C: Sirf running water se rinse karna

questions.explanation: Mixer attachments ko warm soapy water se thoroughly wash karke air dry karna chahiye taaki food residue aur bacteria remove ho sakein.

questions.question: Food safety ke according, TCS (Time/Temperature Control for Safety) food ko kitni der tak danger zone (5°C - 60°C) mein rakha ja sakta hai?

options.B: 6 ghante se zyada nahi

questions.explanation: TCS foods ko danger zone mein 4 ghante se zyada nahi rakhna chahiye, warna bacteria rapidly multiply ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek bakery mein cutting boards ko sanitize karne ke liye kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Bleach solution ya approved sanitizer

questions.explanation: Cutting boards ko clean karne ke baad, unhein bleach solution ya kisi approved food-safe sanitizer se sanitize karna bahut zaruri hai.

questions.question: Personal hygiene maintain karne ke liye, jewellery pehenna kitna acceptable hai bakery mein?

options.B: Wedding band allowed hai
options.C: Koi bhi jewellery allowed nahi hai

questions.explanation: Food safety regulations ke according, bakery mein koi bhi jewellery pehenna allowed nahi hai, kyunki yeh physical contaminants ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek digital weighing scale ka primary benefit kya hai bakery mein?

options.A: Yeh ingredients ko jaldi mix karta hai
options.B: Precise measurement provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Digital weighing scale baking mein precise measurements ke liye essential hai, jo consistent results deta hai.

questions.question: Spatula ka main use kya hai pastry making mein?

options.B: Ingredients ko measure karna
options.C: Batter ko fold karna aur spread karna

questions.explanation: Spatula ka use batter ko gently fold karne, frosting spread karne aur bowls ko scrape karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Why is it important to calibrate your oven regularly?

options.B: To ensure accurate baking temperatures

questions.explanation: Oven ko calibrate karna zaruri hai taaki woh sahi temperature par operate kare, jisse baking results consistent aur accurate hon.

questions.question: Agar aapke bakery product mein glass ka tukda mil jaye, toh yeh kis type ka hazard hai?

options.B: Chemical hazard

questions.explanation: Glass ka tukda ya koi bhi foreign object jaise hair, plastic, metal physical hazard ki category mein aata hai, jo khane wale ko physically harm kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Maida (All-purpose flour) mein kya ingredient hota hai jo gluten develop karta hai?

options.B: Protein

questions.explanation: Maida mein protein hota hai, jo paani ke contact mein aane par gluten develop karta hai, jisse baked goods ko structure milta hai.

questions.question: Baking powder aur baking soda mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Baking powder mein acid aur base dono hote hain, jabki baking soda ko acid ki zarurat hoti hai
options.B: Baking soda mein acid aur base dono hote hain, jabki baking powder ko acid ki zarurat hoti hai
options.C: Dono same hain, bas naam alag hain
options.D: Baking powder sirf cookies ke liye hai, baking soda cakes ke liye

questions.explanation: Baking powder ek complete leavening agent hai jismein acid aur base dono hote hain. Jabki baking soda sirf ek base hai jise activate hone ke liye ek acidic ingredient ki zarurat hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek pastry chef ke liye apron pehenna kyu zaruri hai?

options.B: Uniform ka part hai
options.C: Clothes ko food se protect karne aur hygiene maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Body temperature regulate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Apron pehenna clothes ko stains se bachata hai aur food ko external contaminants se protect karke hygiene maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Cake batter ko overmix karne se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Cake tough aur chewy banega
options.D: Cake ka colour change ho jayega

questions.explanation: Cake batter ko overmix karne se gluten zyada develop ho jata hai, jisse cake tough aur chewy ban sakta hai.

questions.question: Creaming method mein sabse pehle kin ingredients ko mix kiya jata hai?

options.B: Sugar aur eggs

questions.explanation: Creaming method mein, sabse pehle room temperature butter aur sugar ko ek saath cream kiya jata hai jab tak woh light aur fluffy na ho jaye.

questions.question: Cake ko oven se nikalne ke baad तुरंत (immediately) kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use decorate karna shuru kar dena chahiye
options.B: Use wire rack par thanda hone ke liye rakhna chahiye
options.C: Use plastic wrap se cover kar dena chahiye
options.D: Use fridge mein rakh dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Cake ko oven se nikalne ke baad, use wire rack par thanda hone ke liye rakhna chahiye taaki steam escape ho sake aur cake soggy na ho.

questions.question: Agar cake oven mein beech se sink ho jaye, toh uska kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Cake underbaked tha ya oven door jaldi khola gaya
options.C: Batter mein bahut zyada flour tha
options.D: Cake zyada der tak bake hua tha

questions.explanation: Cake ka beech se sink hona underbaking ya baking ke dauran oven door jaldi kholne ka result ho sakta hai, jisse cake ka structure collapse ho jata hai.

questions.question: Maida ko sifting (chhanne) ka kya benefit hai cake baking mein?

options.A: Maida ka weight kam hota hai
options.B: Lumps remove hote hain aur air incorporate hoti hai
options.C: Maida ka colour change hota hai

questions.explanation: Maida ko sift karne se uske lumps remove hote hain aur usmein air incorporate hoti hai, jisse cake light aur fluffy banta hai.

questions.question: Egg yolks ka main role kya hai cake batter mein?

options.B: Moisture, richness aur emulsification provide karna
options.C: Leavening agent ki tarah kaam karna

questions.explanation: Egg yolks cakes mein moisture, richness aur emulsification (ingredients ko bind karna) provide karte hain, jisse texture smooth hota hai.

questions.question: Sponge cake banate samay, eggs ko sugar ke saath kab tak whip karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab tak sugar dissolve na ho jaye
options.B: Jab tak mixture light, pale aur thick na ho jaye (ribbon stage)
options.D: Jab tak foam na ban jaye

questions.explanation: Sponge cake mein eggs aur sugar ko tab tak whip karna chahiye jab tak mixture light, pale aur thick (ribbon stage) na ho jaye, jisse cake ko structure aur lightness milti hai.

questions.question: Cake tin ko grease aur dust karne ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Cake ko zyada golden brown banane ke liye
options.B: Cake ko tin se aasani se nikalne ke liye
options.C: Cake ko zyada rise karwane ke liye
options.D: Cake ko zyada flavorful banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Cake tin ko grease aur dust karne se cake bake hone ke baad tin se aasani se nikal jata hai aur chipakta nahi.

questions.question: Muffin method ka primary characteristic kya hai?

options.A: Wet aur dry ingredients ko alag-alag mix karna aur phir combine karna
options.B: Butter aur sugar ko cream karna

questions.explanation: Muffin method mein, wet ingredients ko alag mix kiya jata hai aur dry ingredients ko alag. Phir in dono ko minimally combine kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar cake oven mein top se jal raha hai lekin andar se kachcha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Oven temperature bahut zyada hai
options.C: Batter mein bahut zyada liquid hai

questions.explanation: Agar cake top se jal raha hai aur andar se kachcha hai, toh iska matlab hai ki oven temperature bahut zyada hai, jisse bahar jaldi cook ho jata hai aur andar nahi.

questions.question: Cake flour, all-purpose flour se kis tarah alag hota hai?

options.A: Cake flour mein protein content zyada hota hai
options.B: Cake flour mein protein content kam hota hai
options.C: Dono mein koi khaas fark nahi
options.D: Cake flour sirf brown colour ka hota hai

questions.explanation: Cake flour mein all-purpose flour ke muqable kam protein content hota hai, jisse gluten development kam hota hai aur cakes soft aur tender bante hain.

questions.question: Baking soda ko activate karne ke liye kis ingredient ki zarurat hoti hai?

options.B: Fat

questions.explanation: Baking soda ek base hai aur use carbon dioxide gas release karne ke liye kisi acidic ingredient ki zarurat hoti hai, jo leavening mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Room temperature ingredients use karna cake baking mein kyu important hai?

options.A: Yeh ingredients ko jaldi dissolve karta hai
options.B: Yeh ingredients ko aasani se combine hone deta hai aur smooth emulsion banata hai
options.C: Yeh cake ko zyada rise karata hai
options.D: Yeh cake ka shelf life badhata hai

questions.explanation: Room temperature ingredients aasani se combine hote hain aur ek smooth emulsion banate hain, jisse cake ka texture aur consistency behtar hoti hai.

questions.question: Bundt pan ka main use kya hai?

options.B: Decorative shaped cakes bake karna

questions.explanation: Bundt pan special decorative shapes wale cakes bake karne ke liye use hota hai, jismein centre mein hole hota hai.

questions.question: Agar cake batter bahut run-off (patla) hai, toh kya adjust karna chahiye?

options.B: Flour ki quantity kam karein

questions.explanation: Agar batter bahut patla hai, toh liquid ingredients ki quantity kam karni chahiye, ya flour ki quantity thodi badhani chahiye, taaki consistency sahi ho.

questions.question: Baking ke dauran cake ki doneness check karne ka sabse reliable tarika kya hai?

options.B: Usko touch karke (springy feel)

questions.explanation: Toothpick test sabse reliable tarika hai; jab toothpick cake ke center mein dalne par clean nikle, toh cake done hai.

questions.question: Chiffon cake mein kya unique ingredient hota hai jo use light aur fluffy banata hai?

options.B: Vegetable oil

questions.explanation: Chiffon cake mein vegetable oil use hota hai instead of butter, jo use ek unique light aur moist texture deta hai, aur whipped egg whites bhi lightness mein contribute karte hain.

questions.question: Buttercream frosting banane ke liye basic ingredients kya hain?

options.B: Butter, powdered sugar, milk/cream, vanilla

questions.explanation: Buttercream frosting ke basic ingredients butter, powdered sugar, thoda sa liquid (milk/cream) aur vanilla extract hote hain.

questions.question: Ganache banane ke liye kin do main ingredients ki zarurat hoti hai?

options.B: Chocolate aur heavy cream

questions.explanation: Ganache chocolate aur heavy cream ko mix karke banaya jata hai. Iski consistency cream aur chocolate ke ratio par depend karti hai.

questions.question: Cream cheese frosting ko store karne ka best tarika kya hai?

options.B: Airtight container mein refrigerator mein

questions.explanation: Cream cheese frosting mein dairy products hote hain, isliye ise airtight container mein refrigerator mein store karna chahiye taaki kharab na ho.

questions.question: Royal icing ka main use kya hai cake decoration mein?

options.B: Fine piping work aur structural decorations banana

questions.explanation: Royal icing hard aur crisp ho jata hai dry hone par, isliye yeh delicate piping work, intricate designs aur structural decorations ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Agar buttercream frosting bahut soft ho jaye, toh use thik karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Thoda aur powdered sugar add karein ya thodi der fridge mein rakhein

questions.explanation: Soft buttercream ko thick karne ke liye, thoda aur powdered sugar add kiya ja sakta hai ya use thodi der fridge mein rakhkar thanda kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Mirror glaze (Glaçage Miroir) ki main characteristic kya hai?

options.B: Opaque aur thick

questions.explanation: Mirror glaze apne highly glossy aur reflective finish ke liye jaani jati hai, jo cakes aur pastries ko stunning look deti hai.

questions.question: Praline paste banane ke liye kya main ingredients chahiye?

options.B: Nuts (jaise hazelnut, almond) aur caramelized sugar

questions.explanation: Praline paste nuts (aam taur par hazelnuts ya almonds) aur caramelized sugar ko grind karke banaya jata hai, jo fillings aur flavouring mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Lemon curd banane ke liye kaunse ingredients essential hain?

options.B: Lemon zest, cream, gelatin

questions.explanation: Lemon curd ke essential ingredients lemon juice, sugar, eggs aur butter hain, jo use smooth aur tangy texture dete hain.

questions.question: Pastry cream (Crème Pâtissière) ka main thickening agent kya hai?

options.B: Cornstarch ya flour

questions.explanation: Pastry cream ko cornstarch ya flour se thicken kiya jata hai, jo use custard-like consistency deta hai.

questions.question: Swiss meringue buttercream (SMBC) ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.A: Yeh raw egg whites se banta hai
options.B: Yeh bahut stable, smooth aur less sweet hota hai
options.C: Yeh sirf chocolate flavour mein banta hai
options.D: Yeh jaldi se melt ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Swiss meringue buttercream egg whites aur sugar ko heat karke banaya jata hai, jisse yeh stable, silky smooth aur traditional buttercream se kam meetha hota hai.

questions.question: Fondant ke liye kya true hai?

options.A: Yeh liquid state mein use hota hai
options.B: Yeh cake ko ek smooth, matte finish deta hai aur edible clay ki tarah use hota hai
options.C: Yeh sirf piping ke liye use hota hai
options.D: Yeh bahut jaldi dry ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Fondant ek sugar paste hai jo cakes ko smooth, matte finish dene aur intricate edible decorations banane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Coulis kya hai?

options.B: Fresh fruit puree, jise sauces ya garnishes ke roop mein use kiya jata hai

questions.explanation: Coulis ek smooth fruit puree hai jise sauces, glazes ya plate garnishes ke roop mein use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Gelatin ka main function kya hai fillings mein?

options.B: Flavor enhance karna
options.C: Structure provide karna aur set karna

questions.explanation: Gelatin ka main function liquids ko set karna aur fillings, mousses aur glazes ko structure provide karna hai.

questions.question: Glaze ko cake par apply karne ka ideal temperature kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Thanda (Chilled)
options.C: Lukewarm ya room temperature par, recipe ke according

questions.explanation: Glaze ko apply karne ka ideal temperature recipe par depend karta hai, lekin aam taur par lukewarm ya room temperature par hota hai taaki woh evenly spread ho sake aur set ho sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek stable whipped cream chahiye jo jaldi deflate na ho, toh kya add kar sakte hain?

options.B: Cream of tartar ya gelatin powder

questions.explanation: Whipped cream ko stable banane ke liye, thoda sa cream of tartar ya dissolved gelatin powder add kiya ja sakta hai, jo use zyada der tak apni shape maintain karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Chocolate tempering ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Chocolate ko shiny, smooth aur snap-friendly banana

questions.explanation: Chocolate tempering ek process hai jisse chocolate ko shiny finish, smooth texture aur ek accha 'snap' milta hai, aur yeh bloom ko bhi rokta hai.

questions.question: Piping gel ka primary use kya hai cake decoration mein?

options.B: Glossy effects, water droplets ya edible glue ke roop mein

questions.explanation: Piping gel ek transparent, gel-like substance hai jo glossy effects, water droplets simulate karne ya edible glue ke roop mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Cake ko crumb coat karne ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Cake ko zyada moist rakhna
options.C: Loose crumbs ko seal karna taaki final frosting smooth ho

questions.explanation: Crumb coat ek thin layer of frosting hai jo loose crumbs ko seal karta hai, jisse final frosting application smooth aur crumb-free hoti hai.

questions.question: Piping bag mein frosting bharne ka best tarika kya hai?

options.A: Piping bag ko haath mein pakad kar spoon se bharna
options.B: Piping bag ko ek tall glass mein rakhkar bharna
options.D: Piping bag ko table par rakhkar bharna

questions.explanation: Piping bag ko ek tall glass mein rakhkar bharna use stable rakhta hai aur frosting bharne mein aasani hoti hai.

questions.question: Star tip (nozzle) se kaunsa design banaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Stars, rosettes aur shells

questions.explanation: Star tip sabse versatile tips mein se ek hai, jisse stars, rosettes, shells aur borders jaise designs banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Fondant ko cake par apply karne se pehle, cake par kya lagana chahiye?

options.B: Water
options.C: Buttercream ya ganache ki thin layer

questions.explanation: Fondant ko cake par apply karne se pehle, cake par buttercream ya ganache ki ek smooth layer lagani chahiye taaki fondant stick ho aur cake ka surface even ho.

questions.question: Color wheel mein 'complementary colors' kya hote hain?

options.A: Jo ek doosre ke bagal mein hote hain
options.B: Jo ek doosre ke opposite hote hain
options.C: Jo sirf primary colors hote hain
options.D: Jo ek hi family ke hote hain

questions.explanation: Complementary colors color wheel mein ek doosre ke opposite hote hain (jaise red aur green, blue aur orange), aur yeh ek saath use karne par vibrancy badhate hain.

questions.question: Piping consistency ke liye frosting ko kitna thick hona chahiye?

options.B: Smooth aur hold karne wala shape, lekin easily pipeable

questions.explanation: Piping ke liye frosting ko smooth hona chahiye, jo shape hold kar sake lekin aasani se piping bag se nikal sake.

questions.question: Flower nail ka use kis liye hota hai?

options.B: 3D sugar flowers banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Flower nail ek choti, flat-top nail hoti hai jiska use piping bag se 3D sugar flowers banane ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Edible dusts aur edible paints ka main use kya hai?

options.B: Cake decoration ko color aur shine dena

questions.explanation: Edible dusts aur paints ka use cake decorations, jaise fondant figures ya sugar flowers ko color aur metallic/shimmering finish dene ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Offset spatula ka primary function kya hai cake decoration mein?

options.B: Frosting ko evenly spread karna

questions.explanation: Offset spatula ka curved blade frosting ko cakes par evenly aur smoothly spread karne ke liye ideal hota hai, bina fingers ke cake ko touch kiye.

questions.question: Agar fondant bahut sticky ho jaye, toh use thik karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Thoda sa cornstarch ya powdered sugar sprinkle karein

questions.explanation: Sticky fondant ko handle karne ke liye, working surface aur haathon par thoda sa cornstarch ya powdered sugar sprinkle karna chahiye.

questions.question: Basketweave design banane ke liye kaunsa piping tip use hota hai?

options.B: Star tip

questions.explanation: Basketweave design banane ke liye ek special basketweave tip (ya flat tip with serrated edge) ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Dowel rods ka use cake decoration mein kyu kiya jata hai?

options.A: Cake ko cut karne ke liye
options.B: Tiered cakes mein support provide karne ke liye
options.C: Fondant ko roll karne ke liye
options.D: Cake ko mix karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dowel rods tiered cakes mein structure aur support provide karte hain, taaki upper layers lower layers ko crush na karein.

questions.question: Gel food colors, liquid food colors se kis tarah behtar hote hain?

options.B: Yeh zyada vibrant colour dete hain aur batter ki consistency ko kam affect karte hain
options.C: Yeh jaldi dry ho jate hain
options.D: Yeh sirf dark colours ke liye hote hain

questions.explanation: Gel food colors liquid colours ke muqable zyada concentrated hote hain, jisse woh vibrant colors dete hain aur batter ki consistency ko kam dilute karte hain.

questions.question: Cake turntable ka kya fayda hai cake decorating mein?

options.B: Cake ko aasani se rotate karke evenly frost aur decorate karna

questions.explanation: Cake turntable cake ko aasani se rotate karne mein help karta hai, jisse frosting aur decoration evenly apply ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar piping bag mein air bubbles aa jayein, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Bag ko gently squeeze karke air ko tip ki taraf push karein
options.D: Frosting ko nikal kar dobara bharein

questions.explanation: Piping bag mein air bubbles aane se piping inconsistent ho sakti hai. Unhein remove karne ke liye, bag ko gently squeeze karke air ko tip ki taraf push karna chahiye.

questions.question: Stenciling technique ka use kis liye hota hai cake decoration mein?

options.B: Repeated patterns ya designs cake par transfer karne ke liye
options.D: Edible glitter apply karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Stenciling technique mein ek stencil ka use karke repeated patterns ya intricate designs ko frosting, royal icing ya edible dusts ke through cake par transfer kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Edible glitter aur non-toxic glitter mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Edible glitter khaya ja sakta hai, non-toxic sirf decorative hai aur khaya nahi ja sakta
options.D: Edible glitter sirf silver colour ka hota hai

questions.explanation: Edible glitter food-safe ingredients se bana hota hai aur khaya ja sakta hai, jabki non-toxic glitter sirf decorative purposes ke liye hota hai aur khane ke liye safe nahi hota.

questions.question: Puff pastry ko 'laminated dough' kyu kehte hain?

options.A: Kyunki yeh bahut soft hota hai
options.B: Kyunki ismein butter ki layers hoti hain jo dough ki layers ke beech fold hoti hain
options.C: Kyunki yeh oven mein phool jata hai
options.D: Kyunki ismein bahut zyada sugar hoti hai

questions.explanation: Puff pastry ko laminated dough kehte hain kyunki ismein butter ki multiple layers ko dough ki layers ke beech fold kiya jata hai, jisse baking par flaky texture banta hai.

questions.question: Choux pastry ka main characteristic kya hai?

options.B: Yeh hollow hota hai aur fillings ke liye perfect hai
options.C: Yeh crispy aur flat hota hai

questions.explanation: Choux pastry bake hone par hollow ho jata hai, jisse yeh cream, custard ya other fillings ke liye perfect hota hai (eclairs, profiteroles).

questions.question: Tart shell ko 'blind bake' karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Tart ko bina filling ke bake karna
options.B: Tart ko bahut high temperature par bake karna
options.C: Tart ko dark room mein bake karna
options.D: Tart ko sirf bottom se bake karna

questions.explanation: Blind baking ka matlab hai tart shell ko uski filling daalne se pehle bake karna, taaki woh crispy ho jaye aur soggy na ho.

questions.question: Mousse ki light aur airy texture kis ingredient se aati hai?

options.A: Heavy cream aur/ya whipped egg whites
options.B: Flour

questions.explanation: Mousse ki light aur airy texture usmein fold kiye gaye whipped heavy cream aur/ya whipped egg whites (meringue) se aati hai.

questions.question: Sabse common pie dough (Pâte Brisée) banane ke liye kya main ingredients chahiye?

options.B: Flour, sugar, yeast, milk

questions.explanation: Pâte Brisée (shortcrust pastry) ke main ingredients flour, cold butter, thanda paani aur salt hote hain.

questions.question: Crème brûlée ko serve karne se pehle kya kiya jata hai?

options.A: Uspar chocolate sauce dala jata hai
options.B: Upar sugar sprinkle karke torch se caramelize kiya jata hai
options.C: Upar whipped cream dali jati hai

questions.explanation: Crème brûlée ko serve karne se pehle, uski top par sugar sprinkle karke torch se caramelize kiya jata hai, jisse ek hard, glassy layer banti hai.

questions.question: Macarons banane ke liye kaunse ingredients essential hain?

options.B: Almond flour, egg whites, powdered sugar, granulated sugar

questions.explanation: Macarons banane ke liye almond flour, egg whites, powdered sugar aur granulated sugar essential hain. Inhe sahi technique se mix karne par signature 'feet' develop hote hain.

questions.question: Tiramisu mein kaunsa cheese use hota hai?

options.B: Mascarpone cheese

questions.explanation: Tiramisu mein Mascarpone cheese use hota hai, jo use rich aur creamy texture deta hai.

questions.question: Panna Cotta kya hai?

options.B: Ek Italian dessert jo sweetened cream aur gelatin se banta hai

questions.explanation: Panna Cotta ek classic Italian dessert hai jo sweetened cream aur gelatin se banta hai, jise mold mein set kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Sabse important factor kya hai jo puff pastry ki flakiness ko affect karta hai?

options.B: Butter ka temperature aur folding technique

questions.explanation: Puff pastry ki flakiness ke liye butter ka cold temperature aur sahi folding technique bahut important hai, kyunki yeh butter aur dough ki distinct layers maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Éclairs banane ke liye kaunse pastry dough ka use hota hai?

options.B: Shortcrust pastry

questions.explanation: Éclairs choux pastry se bante hain, jo bake hone par hollow ho jate hain aur unhein cream ya custard se fill kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Parfait ka matlab kya hai dessert context mein?

options.B: Layers mein arranged dessert, aam taur par fruit, cream, aur granola/cake ke saath

questions.explanation: Dessert parfait ek layered dessert hota hai, jismein fruits, cream, custard, cake ya granola ko tall glass mein layers mein arrange kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapki shortcrust pastry hard aur brittle ho jaye, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Bahut kam gluten development

questions.explanation: Shortcrust pastry ko overwork karne se gluten zyada develop ho jata hai, jisse pastry hard aur brittle ho sakti hai. Isse minimal handling ki zarurat hoti hai.

questions.question: Palmier cookies banane ke liye kis dough ka use hota hai?

options.B: Puff pastry dough

questions.explanation: Palmier cookies puff pastry dough se bante hain, jise sugar ke saath roll aur fold karke bake kiya jata hai, jisse crispy, flaky heart-shaped cookies banti hain.

questions.question: Aam taur par cheesecake ko kaise bake kiya jata hai taaki cracks na aayein?

options.B: Water bath (bain-marie) mein

questions.explanation: Cheesecakes ko aam taur par water bath (bain-marie) mein bake kiya jata hai, jo evenly heat distribute karta hai aur cracks ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Meringue banane ke liye egg whites ko kab tak whip karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab tak woh foamy na ho jaye
options.B: Jab tak soft peaks na ban jayein
options.C: Jab tak stiff, glossy peaks na ban jayein

questions.explanation: Meringue ke liye egg whites ko tab tak whip karna chahiye jab tak woh stiff aur glossy peaks na banayein, jisse air incorporate ho aur structure stable ho.

questions.question: Costing karte samay, 'fixed costs' kya hote hain?

options.A: Ingredients ki cost jo har batch ke saath badalti hai
options.B: Rent, equipment depreciation, salaries jaise kharche jo production se independent hote hain

questions.explanation: Fixed costs woh kharche hote hain jo production level se independent hote hain, jaise rent, insurance, equipment depreciation aur fixed salaries.

questions.question: 'Inventory management' ka kya matlab hai bakery mein?

options.A: Sabhi employees ke naam yaad rakhna
options.B: Ingredients aur supplies ko track karna, order karna aur store karna
options.D: Customers ke orders ko manage karna

questions.explanation: Inventory management ka matlab hai bakery ke ingredients, supplies aur finished products ka record rakhna, unhein efficiently order aur store karna taaki wastage kam ho aur stock available ho.

questions.question: Ek cake ke price ko determine karte samay, 'labour cost' ko include karna kyu zaruri hai?

options.B: Kyunki decoration aur baking mein lage time aur effort ka paisa recover karna hota hai
options.C: Kyunki yeh customer ko impress karta hai
options.D: Kyunki yeh profit margin ko kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Labour cost ko include karna zaruri hai taaki cake banane mein lage time aur skills ka kharcha recover ho sake aur business sustainable ho.

questions.question: Agar ek customer ko cake mein allergy ho, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unko koi bhi cake de dena chahiye
options.B: Unki allergy ke baare mein puchna chahiye aur uske according safe option suggest karna chahiye
options.D: Unko bolna chahiye ki koi cake nahi hai

questions.explanation: Customer ki allergies ke baare mein puchna aur unke liye safe option provide karna professional practice aur food safety ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Cake presentation mein 'balance' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Decorations ka evenly distributed hona taaki cake aesthetically pleasing lage

questions.explanation: Presentation mein balance ka matlab hai decorations, colors aur elements ka evenly distributed hona taaki cake visually harmonious aur pleasing lage.

questions.question: Customer feedback lena kyu important hai?

options.B: Products aur services ko improve karne ke liye
options.C: Customers ko busy rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback products aur services mein sudhar karne aur customer satisfaction badhane ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Agar ek cake ki delivery ke dauran woh damage ho jaye, toh aapka best response kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Customer se maafi mangna aur solution offer karna (jaise replacement ya refund)

questions.explanation: Damage hone par customer se maafi mangna aur ek fair solution offer karna (replacement, refund ya discount) acchi customer service ki nishani hai.

questions.question: Portion control ka kya fayda hai bakery business mein?

options.B: Consistency maintain karna aur food cost control karna

questions.explanation: Portion control se har serving ki consistency maintain hoti hai aur ingredients ki wastage kam hoti hai, jisse food cost control hota hai.

questions.question: Ek bakery mein 'FIFO' (First-In, First-Out) system ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabse pehle customer ko serve karna
options.B: Jo ingredients pehle aaye hain, unhein pehle use karna
options.C: Jo ingredients sabse expensive hain, unhein pehle use karna
options.D: Jo ingredients kam hain, unhein pehle use karna

questions.explanation: FIFO system mein jo ingredients pehle store kiye gaye hain, unhein pehle use kiya jata hai taaki spoilage kam ho aur freshness maintain rahe.

questions.question: Upselling ka kya example hai bakery mein?

options.A: Customer ko sirf ek cupcake dena
options.B: Customer ko cake ke saath matching cupcakes ya extra toppings suggest karna
options.C: Customer ko kam price wala item offer karna

questions.explanation: Upselling ka matlab hai customer ko higher-value product ya additional items suggest karna, jaise cake ke saath matching cupcakes ya extra decorations.

questions.question: Agar aapko pata chale ki aapki ek ingredient supply short hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Customer ko inform karna chahiye aur alternative offer karna chahiye ya emergency order place karna chahiye
options.C: Chup chap customer ko kuch aur de dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Ingredient shortage hone par customer ko transparently inform karna aur solution offer karna ya emergency order place karna professional practice hai.

questions.question: Food styling aur photography ka kya importance hai aajkal ke bakery business mein?

options.B: Products ko attractive dikhana aur social media par engagement badhana
options.D: Sirf professional chefs ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Food styling aur photography products ko visually appealing banate hain, jo social media marketing aur customer engagement ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Ek new recipe develop karte samay, 'recipe costing sheet' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Har ingredient ki exact cost calculate karna aur selling price determine karna

questions.explanation: Recipe costing sheet har ingredient ki cost, portion size aur total cost ko track karne mein help karta hai, jisse sahi selling price determine kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'active listening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer ki baat ko dhyan se sunna aur unki zarurat ko samajhna
options.D: Customer ko jaldi se jaldi answer dena

questions.explanation: Active listening ka matlab hai customer ki baat ko dhyan se sunna, unki concerns ko samajhna aur sahi solution provide karna.

questions.question: Bakery mein 'waste management' kyu important hai?

options.B: Operating costs kam karne, hygiene maintain karne aur sustainability badhane ke liye
options.C: Extra staff hire karne ke liye
options.D: Products ko zyada meetha banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Waste management operating costs ko kam karta hai (ingredients wastage rokkar), hygiene maintain karta hai aur business ko more sustainable banata hai.

questions.question: Online presence (website/social media) ka bakery business ke liye kya fayda hai?

options.B: Naye customers tak pahunchna, products showcase karna aur orders lena

questions.explanation: Online presence naye customers tak pahunchne, products ko visually showcase karne aur online orders receive karne ke liye essential hai modern business mein.
